utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully specified with the necessary details: property (type, location, price range, workspace potential), financing (lender, terms, down payment, interest rate, etc.), legal_services (provider, estimated costs), moving_services (provider, scope, cost), setup_services (utilities and setup fees), and total_budget (full breakdown of purchase price, down payment, mortgage, closing costs, inspection, moving, setup, monthly costs). An additional item, property_survey, is included but not required. Therefore, all 6 required items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a purchase property described as a '1–2 Bedroom Modern Condo' in Toronto priced around CAD 450,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the 'New Build' (CAD 480K, rating 10) best fits this: it is modern, within the given budget range, and matches eco-conscious and creative workspace preferences. The financing program chosen was 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage Preapproval' from Scotiabank, corresponding to the 'First-Time Buyer' purchase financing option (rating 10). The legal services provider was 'Premium Legal Services,' which aligns with the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 8). The property survey described as 'Condo Inspection (structure & systems)' with cost CAD 400–500 best matches the 'Specialist Survey' (CAD 450, rating 6). The moving service 'Toronto MoveSmart Logistics' with cost CAD 1,000–1,300 suggests a higher-end move, corresponding to 'Premium Moving' (CAD 1200, rating 7). The utilities setup, including high-speed Bell Fiber internet and total CAD 170/month, corresponds to the 'Premium Utilities' package (rating 9). Thus, the mapped ratings are: New Build = 10, First-Time Buyer = 10, Premium Legal Package = 8, Specialist Survey = 6, Premium Moving = 7, Premium Utilities = 9.
